title: AtlaSent revocation list
description: Flat list of revoked KIDs (R2/R3/R4) and revoked Sigstore identities (R1). Per ADR-005 D2, SDK consumers refresh on a 4-hour default cadence (5 minute floor). Verifiers MUST reject any artifact whose signing material appears here, regardless of validity windows.

issued_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at which this revocation list was published.

revoked_keys.description: KIDs whose private material is treated as compromised. Each entry MUST match a kid in atlasent-verifier-keys.json (operator-visible cross-reference).

revoked_identities.description: Sigstore identities that may no longer sign artifacts under their named role. Each entry MUST match an identity_regexp in atlasent-sigstore-identities.json.

revoked_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at which the revocation was published.

reason.description: Short human-readable reason. Free text; operator-facing.
